name: Dalarna County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the azure field of the Dalarna arms
the gold crossed arrows and crown

description: A square blue flag charged centrally with two crossed gold arrows surmounted by a coronet, the historic emblem of Dalarna.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Dalarna County, derived from the medieval coat of arms of the historic province of Dalarna (Dalecarlia).

features.symbolism: the azure field of the historic Dalarna (Dalecarlia) provincial arms

features.role: two crossed gold arrows of Dalarna, ensigned with a coronet
features.symbolism: two gold arrows crossed in saltire on a blue field, surmounted by a coronet; the historic emblem of the province of Dalarna (Dalecarlia).
